description: BritBox is a subscription streaming service focused on British television programming. Its public web presence for the given domain primarily serves consumer streaming, with one cataloged backend API surface referenced as Rocket Services.
summary: britbox.co.uk exposes one documented HTTP API surface: Rocket Services at `https://isl.britbox.co.uk/api`; public docs are referenced at `https://isl.britbox.co.uk/api/spec`, but authentication details could not be confirmed from accessible BritBox documentation.
